text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A month before the Arima Kinen, I open my mail
one morning to a letter from the academy. Inside,
I find midterm tallies for the race's nominations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the second year in a row, I find Grass
Wonder's name on the list. Then, I check which of
her rivals we're likely to see on the big day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's one familiar name listed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if the racers themselves have seen these
tallies yet.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you for a lovely meal!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nothin' beats a clean plate and a full belly!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe never did show up, though, did she?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Right? She just left that message sayin' "start
without me!"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But have ya noticed, Grass?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: There's somethin' different about Spe these days.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I have noticed.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I suspect I'll be facing her in the Arima.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Should it come to that—oh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hm? That a message from your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It's Spe. She says she wants to speak with me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: She said what?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, and there's a rather spirited tone to her
writing. ...I can hardly wait to meet her on the
roof.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmm... So, now Spe's the one gettin' all fired up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Is that envy I'm detecting?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: H-hold up! What makes you say that?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I apologize for the wait, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to call you up so suddenly. Thanks for
coming though.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Have you seen the Arima tallies yet?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You'll be racing in the Arima Kinen, yes, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And... I'm gonna beat you, Grass.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I saw the Mainichi Okan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You, Suzuka, El... You were all amazing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It was almost scary, seeing you three at full force.
You were so powerful... so blindingly bright...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...And so distant.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My friends... The people I admire... Everyone was
out there giving their all on the same track.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Except me! I'm the only one being left behind!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I won't let it go on like this. I won't.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I want to show you all what I can do! I'm gonna
compete right along with you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And I wanna win!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen is mine.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll make my moms proud... Because I'm Special
Week, the top Umamusume in all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll face you with everything I have.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...And that is the situation.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Spe is training especially hard. I'm certain she'll
be almost unrecognizable in a month's time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I pledged my determination. I'll train just as
hard and accomplish what I've set out to do.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I suppose I am.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Maruzen, Sei, El, Suzuka, and now Spe...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Each of them are truly strong. Overcoming them
will be no easy task.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But overcome them I will—one by one.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Each time will affirm my progress, each step
becoming a source of my strength.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That is how I feel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the smile on Grass Wonder's face, I'm
reminded of the words Maruzensky told me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But, hey. Grass will be fine. Just peachy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: After all...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's one important thing she's always had tons
and tons of. Something I never had, no matter
how I longed for it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky was revered as the Beast because
there was nobody else who could match her
strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Grass Wonder is surrounded by others
pushing her to do better.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well then, Trainer... shall we begin our meeting?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We still have so much training to do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder is set to take a major leap forward
at the Arima Kinen. There's no doubt in my mind!
